evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implementing data quality, validation, and governance standards; quality-focused mindset with testing and CI/CD experience
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, testing, CI/CD, and governance are core responsibilities, placing this firmly in rigour territory.
evidence.domain_risk: Trusted data foundation enables better decisions across Doodle
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is a SaaS product company where data quality affects decision-making but without explicit financial/compliance risk language, classifying as moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Defining and maintaining trusted business metrics; supporting product analytics frameworks
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Multiple named data functions and scale-existing framing suggests a mid-stage team with infrastructure in place.
evidence.jd_authorship: Designing and maintaining scalable analytics data models; defining and maintaining trusted business metrics; implementing data quality, validation, and governance standards
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical language with specific methodology (dbt, dimensional modeling) indicates hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Product analytics and A/B testing; trusted business metrics; collaborating with Product, Engineering, Marketing, Finance, Leadership
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product focus (A/B testing, product analytics) alongside finance and cross-functional support indicates mixed orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Designing and maintaining; Defining and maintaining; Implementing
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Verbs like 'defining,' 'designing,' and 'maintaining' indicate strategic ownership of data foundations and metric definitions.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI coding tools, LLM-based features, or AI data infrastructure in the responsibilities.
evidence.testing_framing: Implementing data quality, validation, and governance standards; quality-focused mindset with testing and CI/CD experience
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and data quality are framed as owned responsibilities, not just tool familiarity.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: trusted data foundation; data quality, validation, and governance standards; quality-focused mindset
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: trust and governance language dominates, reflecting concern about data accuracy affecting business decisions.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Designing and maintaining scalable analytics data models; developing transformation pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Blend of maintaining existing infrastructure and scaling, suggesting fix_scale posture.
evidence.language_gate: we can only consider your application if you are based and have the right to work in Germany or London
